mapper.select: SELECT offday_id, off_date, start_time, end_time, off_reason FROM shop_offday
SELECT offday_id, off_date, start_time, end_time, off_reason FROM shop_offday WHERE off_date = #{offDate}
SELECT offday_id, off_date, start_time, end_time, off_reason FROM shop_offday WHERE offday_id = #{offdayId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_offday (off_date, start_time, end_time, off_reason) VALUES ( #{offDate}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{offReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
